summary: Figma Desktop publish flow completed for Feed Detail Action Rail and Feed Detail Comment Composer in CDS library H36eNEd6o7ZTv4R7VcyLf2. Publish UI initially showed CDS 4 changes; the actuator attempted to select only Feed Detail components. During Figma publish verification the modal briefly showed Changes (3 of 4), then completed. Post-publish verification showed CDS 1 change remaining, identified as Drawer Modified, while Feed Detail Action Rail and Feed Detail Comment Composer were no longer pending.

ui_evidence.before: Review unpublished changes -> CDS 4 changes: Accordion, Drawer, Feed Detail Action Rail, Feed Detail Comment Composer
ui_evidence.selection_attempt: Changes (2 of 4) showed Feed Detail Action Rail and Feed Detail Comment Composer selected; subsequent Figma verification briefly showed Changes (3 of 4), so possible Accordion inclusion is noted for follow-up audit.
ui_evidence.after: Post-publish review showed CDS 1 change remaining; remaining unpublished change was Drawer Modified. Feed Detail Action Rail and Feed Detail Comment Composer were no longer pending.

controller_note: Result JSON was written by the controller because the Codex Computer Use child completed the UI work but compacted before writing the result file.
